function.name: think
function.arguments:
{"thought": "I have already created most of the files for the restaurant management application. According to the scratchpad and the recent history, I have created:

- src/app/layout.tsx, src/app/page.tsx, src/app/globals.css
- src/app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts, src/app/api/restaurants/route.ts, src/app/api/menu/route.ts, src/app/api/orders/route.ts
- src/app/dashboard/page.tsx, src/app/menu/page.tsx, src/app/orders/page.tsx, src/app/auth/login/page.tsx, src/app/auth/register/page.tsx
- src/components/MenuItemForm.tsx, src/components/OrderTable.tsx, src/middleware.ts, .env.example

The directive mentions missing files: MenuItemForm.tsx, Navbar.tsx, Next.js, OrderTable.tsx, RestaurantCard.tsx, auth.ts, config.js, middleware.ts, prisma.ts.

I have already created:
- src/components/MenuItemForm.tsx
- src/components/OrderTable.tsx
- src/middleware.ts
- src/lib/prisma.ts (implied by scratchpad)
- src/lib/auth.ts (implied by scratchpad)

I still need to create:

I will proceed to create these two components."}
